channel.title: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page
channel.description: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: The Mysterious Disappearance of Lisa Irwin
item.description: A look at the mysterious disappearance of Lisa Irwin, examining the timeline, investigation, and the unanswered questions that remain in the case.

media:content.media:title: The Mysterious Disappearance of Lisa Irwin
media:content.media:description: A look at the mysterious disappearance of Lisa Irwin, examining the timeline, investigation, and the unanswered questions that remain in the case.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: What Happened to Five-Year-Old Haleigh Cummings?
item.description: A look at the disappearance of five-year-old Haleigh Cummings, examining the investigation, key events, and the questions that remain unanswered in this tragic case.

media:content.media:title: What Happened to Five-Year-Old Haleigh Cummings?
media:content.media:description: A look at the disappearance of five-year-old Haleigh Cummings, examining the investigation, key events, and the questions that remain unanswered in this tragic case.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Who could have murdered Christine and Amber Lundy?
item.description: An overview of the investigation into the murders of Christine and Amber Lundy, exploring the timeline, evidence, and possible suspects in this unresolved case.

media:content.media:title: Who could have murdered Christine and Amber Lundy?
media:content.media:description: An overview of the investigation into the murders of Christine and Amber Lundy, exploring the timeline, evidence, and possible suspects in this unresolved case.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: The Au Pair Case: Disturbing Footage and Emergency Calls
item.description: A factual look at the Au Pair case, reviewing emergency calls and relevant footage while presenting the investigation with sensitivity and accuracy.

media:content.media:title: The Au Pair Case: Disturbing Footage and Emergency Calls
media:content.media:description: A factual look at the Au Pair case, reviewing emergency calls and relevant footage while presenting the investigation with sensitivity and accuracy.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page

item.title: Footage Inside the Terrible Turpin House
item.description: A factual look at footage from the Turpin house, showing the conditions and context of the investigation while respecting the sensitivity of the case.

media:content.media:title: Footage Inside the Terrible Turpin House
media:content.media:description: A factual look at footage from the Turpin house, showing the conditions and context of the investigation while respecting the sensitivity of the case.
media:content.media:credit: Annie Elise x 10 to LIFE Page
